jurisdiction: Municipio de La Paz, BCS + COFEPRIS Delegación Baja California Sur

corrections.description: Municipal building permit correction: site plan requires updated setback dimensions from property line per La Paz municipal zoning code. Three north-side setback dimensions shown as 3.0m; code minimum is 3.5m. Adjust site plan and resubmit architectural plan sheet A-001.

COFEPRIS correction — medical gas systems: zone valve locations must be shown on a separate dedicated medical gas zone diagram per COFEPRIS NOM requirements. Currently shown only on general MEP plan. Prepare standalone medical gas zone valve diagram sheet and resubmit.

permits_obtained: Licencia de Construcción — Municipio de La Paz, BCS
Licencia Sanitaria — COFEPRIS Delegación BCS (private outpatient clinic: consultorios, urgencias, laboratorio, farmacia, rayos-X)
Autorización de Sistemas de Gases Medicinales — COFEPRIS
